query: Which lab/model currently has the highest score on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index as of today, and what is that score? Distinguish clearly between Anthropic Claude Fable 5 (reportedly launched at #1 with 64.9), Claude Opus 4.8 (reportedly #1 at ~55.7% on BenchLM mirror), and OpenAI GPT-5.5. Account for the fact that Fable 5 was suspended June 12 and redeployed July 1, 2026, and reconcile whether the top index score is 64.9 (Fable 5) or ~55.7% (Opus 4.8), including scale/normalization differences across mirrors.
answer:
## Summary

**Current #1 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (as of July 7, 2026): Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, at a score of 60** on the live v4.1 index.

**Reconciling the three numbers:**

1. **64.9 (Fable 5)** — Correct for **launch day (June 9, 2026)**, but measured on the **pre-v4.1 index**. AA then shipped **Intelligence Index v4.1**, which re-baselined GDPval-AA to v2 (Elo anchored to human expert = 1000), compressing the whole scale. Fable 5's live number is now **60**, not 64.9.

2. **~55.7% (Opus 4.8)** — This is **BenchLM.ai's third-party mirror**, which is **stale** (still shows Opus 4.8 as its leader, doesn't list Fable 5 at all) and **differently normalized** (percentages vs. AA's 0–100 integers). So 55.7% is a measurement of **Opus 4.8, not Fable 5**, on a scale that can't be compared point-for-point with AA's.

3. **GPT-5.5** — Was AA's leader at its April 23 release, but was overtaken first by Opus 4.8 (launch 61.4) and then by Fable 5. On the live v4.1 index it scores ~55 (xhigh), behind both.

**Suspension/redeployment:** Fable 5 launched June 9, was suspended June 12, redeployed July 1, 2026, and is again live and #1.

**So the answer to "is the top score 64.9 or ~55.7%?"** — Neither is the current authoritative figure. The live top index score is **60 (Fable 5, AA v4.1)**. 64.9 is a superseded launch value; ~55.7% is a stale, differently-scaled mirror of a *different* model (Opus 4.8).

Full report and structured data (with all sources and dated data points) have been provided above.

key_facts: Claude Fable 5 is currently #1 on the live Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index with a score of 60 (v4.1) as of early July 2026.
Fable 5 launched at #1 on June 9, 2026 with a score of 64.9 on the pre-recalibration index version.
The '64.9' vs '60' discrepancy is due to AA moving to Intelligence Index v4.1 (June 2026), which re-baselined GDPval-AA to v2 (Elo anchored to human expert = 1000), compressing the scale.
BenchLM.ai's mirror shows Claude Opus 4.8 at 55.7% (its leader), GPT-5.5 at 54.8%, and Opus 4.7 Adaptive at 53.5% — Fable 5 is NOT listed in the BenchLM snapshot.
The BenchLM ~55.7% figure is a measurement of Opus 4.8, not Fable 5, on a stale and differently-normalized (percentage) scale.
On the live v4.1 index, GPT-5.5 (xhigh) scores ~55 and Claude Opus 4.8 scores ~56, both behind Fable 5's 60.
GPT-5.5 was AA's leading model at release on April 23, 2026, then overtaken by Opus 4.8 (launch score 61.4 on May 28, 2026), then by Fable 5.
Fable 5 was suspended June 12, 2026 and redeployed July 1, 2026 per Anthropic's official model page; it is again live and #1.
AA displays index scores as rounded 0-100 integers (60/56/55) on the live site; the older launch article used one decimal (64.9).
AA explicitly notes it may update reference parameters over time, so absolute index values drift across versions even for the same model.
